title: Add native PowerShell tool for Windows users (parity with CC PowerShellTool)
description:
## Gap

Claude Code ships a complete PowerShellTool (tools/PowerShellTool/PowerShellTool.tsx, powershellSecurity.ts ~1090 lines, powershellPermissions.ts) that provides native PowerShell execution on Windows with its own security validation layer.

OpenClaudia has no PowerShellTool. On Windows it falls back to Git Bash (src/tools/bash/mod.rs:63-73 — find_git_bash()). This means:
- No native PowerShell syntax support
- No PowerShell-specific security validation (powershellSecurity.ts validates PS-specific injection patterns)
- No PowerShell permission model (powershellPermissions.ts)

## Parity reference
- CC: tools/PowerShellTool/PowerShellTool.tsx, powershellSecurity.ts, powershellPermissions.ts
- OC: missing entirely

## Acceptance
- PowerShellTool that invokes pwsh.exe / powershell.exe
- PS-specific command validation (injection, dangerous cmdlets)
- Windows-only feature flag
